scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check relay-server/server.js && node --check relay-server/create-device.js && node --check relay-server/lib/crypto.js && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/check-windows-relay-script.ps1 && python -c "import ast,pathlib; ast.parse(pathlib.Path('scripts/package-release.py').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))"
